/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-variable -O3 -march=native -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_scan_executor.dir/TestScanExecutor.cpp.o -o test_scan_executor  ../queries_executor/libexecutor.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a ../engine/libengine.a ../CsvMfReader/libreader.a ../CsvMfWriter/libwriter.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
